summary: Russian forces destroyed Ukrainian unmanned boats using FPV drones near Tendrovskaya Spit and the Dnieper River mouth. The HX-2 AI-powered loitering munition, produced by Germany's Helsing, has been delivered to Ukraine at scale, with 6,000 units and a factory capacity of over 1,000 per month. Ukraine is offering partners access to a Ministry of Defense platform to train AI models for unmanned systems using frontline combat data. The "Elka" anti-drone system has conducted multiple kinetic intercepts of Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs in the conflict zone during spring 2026. Ukrainian FPV units are deploying advanced tactics, including using decoys and thermal disruption, while Russian forces report intercepting UAVs and targeting Ukrainian drone control points.
